model: single Test Panel select over 4 Dx groups; each group's Test Parameters = NGS gene panel + Adult/Elderly standalone PCR options
note: ICD-10 codes per the PDF disclaimer are reference/routing only (42 CFR 410.32); the ordering physician selects diagnosis codes. NOT rendered as form options; Relevant Diagnosis is system-fed. Pediatric-restricted PCR blocks and Extended-peds panels were dropped from the form per the adults/elderly deployment rule but are retained here.

panels.title: Adult IEM, Lysosomal & Glycogen Storage Disorders
panels.ngs_genes: GAA, GLA, GBA, ATP7B, IDUA, IDS, NPC1, NPC2, ARSA, LIPA, GCK, HNF1A, HNF4A, HNF1B, OTC, ASL, ASS1, NAGS, CBS, MMACHC, CYP27A1, IVD, AGL, PYGM, PYGL, PHKA1, PHKA2, PHKB, PHKG2, HEXA, HEXB, BTD, ABCD1, CPT2, SLC22A5, ACADVL, ACADM, ETFDH, PAH

dropped_pediatric.extended_panel_genes: GALNS, ARSB, GUSB, GALC, CTNS, CPS1, ARG1, MUT, MMAA, MMAB, GALT

panels.title: Hepatic, Iron, Porphyria, Bile Acid, FAO & CDG
panels.ngs_genes: HMBS, PPOX, CPOX, ALAD, UROD, FECH, ALAS2, HAMP, HJV, TFR2, SLC40A1, CP, CPT1A, ACADS, HADHA, HADHB, ETFA, ETFB, HADH, ACAD9, PMM2, MPI, DPAGT1, AGXT, GRHPR, HOGA1, AKR1D1, CYP7B1, HPRT1, XDH, HGD, FAH, NR1H4, ABCB4, NOTCH2, ATP8B1

dropped_pediatric.extended_panel_genes: UROS, ATP7A, ALG6, DPM1, HSD3B7, ABCB11, JAG1, MLYCD, SLC25A20

panels.title: Hereditary Neuromuscular & Metabolic Myopathy
panels.ngs_genes: CAPN3, SGCA, SGCB, SGCD, SGCG, ANO5, FKRP, LMNA, EMD, SCN4A, CACNA1S, CLCN1, RYR1, LAMP2, GNE, CAV3, MYOT, DES, TCAP, TTN, BAG3, CRYAB, BIN1, DNM2
adult_pcr: DMPK | Fragment analysis and PCR repeat expansion
FXN | Fragment analysis and PCR repeat expansion

dropped_pediatric.extended_panel_genes: DYSF, FKTN, COL6A1, COL6A2, COL6A3, NEB, ACTA1, MTM1

panels.title: Comprehensive Mitochondrial Disorders
panels.ngs_genes: POLG, POLG2, TWNK, TK2, OPA1, PDSS2, RRM2B, SLC25A4, TYMP, BCS1L, COQ2, SDHA, COQ8A, COQ8B, AARS2, DARS2, HARS2, LARS2, MARS2, YARS2, ISCU, GLRX5, MFF, DNM1L, MFN2, OPA3, PDHA1, TIMM8A
adult_pcr: mtDNA (full gene sequence) | NGS — whole mt genome

dropped_pediatric.extended_panel_genes: DGUOK, MPV17, SCO1, SCO2, SUCLA2, SUCLG1, TAZ, COX10, COX15, NDUFS1, NDUFS4, NDUFV1, SURF1, COQ4, COQ9, NFU1, BOLA3, EARS2, FARS2, PDHB, PDHX, DLD, SERAC1, LIAS

reflex_testing_notice: When both a standalone single-gene/repeat-expansion test and the comprehensive NGS panel are selected for the same patient, testing is stepwise/reflex: single-gene first; NGS panel only as reflex if single-gene is negative (CMS medical necessity / NCCI Chapter 10).
